what_was_done: Built relayer crate (5 modules, compiles clean). Designed full withdrawal architecture: covenants on torus-core + BSC BridgeController slashing. Created 4 design docs + TDD writing plan (10 tasks). Analyzed script.cpp opcodes.
known_issues: Build requires USE_UPNP=- flag (miniupnpc not installed)
torus-core script engine is Bitcoin 0.6-era — no CLTV, no CSV, no covenants
Qt GUI not build-tested (only daemon build verified)
Torus-core has no regtest mode (only mainnet/testnet)
next_steps: Implement covenant opcodes (CLTV, CHECKSIGFROMSTACK, OUTPUTAMOUNT, OUTPUTSCRIPT) — see docs/plans/covenant-opcodes-impl.md
Build BridgeController.sol — operator staking, withdrawal tracking, slashing
Run torus-core testnet node for real deposit testing
Add withdrawal flow to relayer (watch BSC burns, coordinate co-signing, submit reverse ZK proof)
